content.en:
"I've seen six seniors!"

Ye Tian said very politely.

"Endless Controller Ye Tian, you actually walked to the top of the mountain!"

A super-perfect controller was taken aback.

Walking to the top of the mountain means that Ye Tianxia entered the Extreme Dao List last time, at least in the top 20 or so, because now more than a dozen people on the Extreme Dao List can walk to the top of the mountain.

Of course, in order to preserve time, many super-perfect controllers will not come to the Extreme Dao Mountain of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm to practice most of the time, but through their progress in the outside world, they will ensure that they will continue to improve their ranking on the Extreme Dao List, so that they will have more time to cultivate.

However, when it comes to the top of the pole list, it is extremely difficult to improve every ranking.

But even so, they never thought that a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm could actually come to the top of the Extreme Dao Mountain.

"I'm just a little luckier!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Although several super-perfect controllers were envious of Ye Tian's demons, they didn't say anything.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took a stroll at the top of Jidao Mountain, the biggest advantage here is the Jidao Ancient Monument, which is located on the top of Jidao Mountain, and the effect of comprehending the power of Jidao here is more than several times better than other places in Jidao Mountain.

Ye Tian found an area at the top of the mountain and began to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao here.

Although he has already comprehended more than a dozen extreme path powers, he will not dislike more, and naturally the more extreme paths he has comprehended, the better.

At the same time, the pole-making chains on Ye Tian's body were about to be broken, he had already broken thirty-five pole-making chains, and only the last one remained.

At this rate, it won't be long before he can break the last chain of Pole Creation.

At present, the only weakness is in terms of will, his Extreme Creation Realm Half-Step Perfect Will is not much higher than other Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect controllers, and it is far from reaching the extreme of the Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect controller.

Of course, there are also many treasures that can improve the will, and Ye Tian is also collecting them now, but he is not in a hurry.

After all, he still wanted to completely master the Endless Extreme Dao in the Half-Step Perfect Controller Realm of the Creation Extreme Realm, so as to break through the Endless Extreme Dao to become the perfect controller, and it would take too long to do so.

So, he's not in a hurry to hit the perfect master.

The summit of Mt. Gokumichi.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao here, and the effect was indeed much better than the rest of the Extreme Dao Mountain, with his comprehension, coupled with the assistance of the Void Sparrow Egg, it didn't take long for the sixteenth Extreme Dao power to be completely condensed.

In addition, Ye Tian would occasionally go to look at the Void Sparrow Egg in the Extreme Dao Source Sea to confirm when this Void Sparrow Egg would hatch.

To this end, Ye Tian also prepared to create an extreme path control technique that could capture the Void Sparrow.

After all, even if this Void Sparrow is born, its strength must be extremely terrifying, and he must only use the Dragon Crow Copy Body to pass, and the Dragon Crow Copy Body is not strong, even if he forcibly breaks through, he does not have enough strength and means, and he can't catch this Void Sparrow, so he must create an Extreme Dao Control Technique specifically for this Void Sparrow.

The Extreme Dao Control Technique is the technique that surpasses the Extreme Perfection Control Technique, and under normal circumstances, only some super-perfect masters master the Extreme Dao Control Technique.

But Ye Tian had mastered so many extreme paths, and it was naturally not difficult to create an extreme path control technique.

Time passed, and 30 million eternal years passed unconsciously.

In the long years now, Ye Tian had mastered nearly a hundred kinds of extreme powers, and the number of them was enough to make countless perfect controllers terrified.

And he had already broken all the thirty-six chains of the Extreme Dao, and with so much Extreme Dao power condensed, the Extreme Dao Body had been raised to an extremely terrifying level.

And over the years, he has also refined a lot of treasures that help to improve his will, and his will has also improved a lot.

Of course.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian has successfully created an Extreme Dao Control Technique.

This Extreme Dao Control Technique was named the Extreme Dao Prison by Ye Tian, based on the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, the Five Elements Extreme Dao, and many Extreme Dao, the Extreme Dao Prison created by the Extreme Dao Prison, which can instantly trap and block the enemy, and seal the enemy.

This move is also specially prepared for the Void Sparrow.

In addition, Ye Tian also spent a long time creating an Extreme Path Secret Technique, the Extreme Path Soul Swallowing Technique, which is an upgraded version of the Extreme Life Swallowing Technique.

However, the Extreme Path Swallowing Technique can only be cast twice, and it can no longer be devoured, as if it is not as good as the three chances of the Extreme Swallowing Technique, but the Extreme Path Swallowing Technique can devour the Void Sparrow, and the Infinite Swallowing Technique has long been useless.

After the Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique was created, it could only be used by Ye Tian alone, and others could not practice or pass it on.

"With the Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique, as well as the Extreme Dao Prison, you only need to wait for the Void Sparrow to give birth before you can capture it!" Ye Tian muttered.

This Void Sparrow was conceived by the Extreme Dao Source Sea Heaven and Earth, and he had no parents and elders, so he would not be supported by powerful Extreme Dao creatures, so he definitely had a chance.

Moreover, according to his calculations, that is, in the last hundreds of thousands of eternal years, the Void Sparrow could be completely born.

In order to ensure that this plan could be completed, Ye Tian copied the Longwu Replica Body, and came to the breeding ground of the Void Sparrow early, where he waited and practiced at the same time.

During this waiting time, it is also very good to be able to improve the strength of Longwu's copy body.

He used the power of a kind of extreme way to refine the dragon crow copy body, and his strength was naturally constantly improving and evolving.

With his current strength, he was enough to exert the strength of Long Wu's copy body to be comparable to that of an ordinary high-level perfect controller.

In the blink of an eye, more than 300,000 eternal years have passed.

On this day, the Void Sparrow Egg began to shake, and this fertile ground began to disintegrate.

At this moment, Ye Tian knew that the Void Sparrow was about to be born.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying aura permeated the air, this was the breath of the Void Sparrow.

Click!

A crisp sound filled the endless space, it was the sound of the Void Sparrow about to break its shell.

As the cracks in the eggshells of the Void Sparrow increased, countless golden lights filled the surroundings.

Soon, a terrifying creature emerged from the Void Sparrow Egg.

Having just been born, the Void Sparrow possessed the strength of an almost high-level perfect controller.

Swish!

As soon as the Void Sparrow spreads its wings, it will tear through time and space and leave.

"I want to go, dream!"

Ye Tian made a move.

In an instant, he cast the Extreme Prison.

A kind of extreme power turned into a part of the prison, directly covering the Void Sparrow.

"Close!"

The Extreme Prison began to shrink, instantly compressing the Void Sparrow into a point of light, and no matter how much it resisted, it couldn't break the Extreme Prison.

In the blink of an eye, the Void Sparrow was taken away by the Extreme Dao Prison and fell into Ye Tian's mouth, where it was swallowed by Ye Tian's dragon crow copy body.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian also began to flee quickly.
